final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a technical documentation aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a clear 4-step sequential layout (Step 1 / Step 2 / Step 3 / Step 4), each step with detailed visual illustration
Subject: must include Docker container deployment process and Hermes-GLMCodingPlan integration workflow
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, instructional atmosphere — exact lighting approach is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, professional direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4", "Hermes", "Docker", "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: must preserve all 4 steps clearly numbered and visually distinct, must show container deployment and API integration flow
Avoid:
